allowed: write under .okra/runs/pumped-fn-skill-20260710/, skills/pumped-fn/, and an isolated eval workspace under .okra/runs/pumped-fn-skill-20260710/eval-ws/
dispatch writer packets to codex exec -m gpt-5.6-terra and review/grading packets to codex exec -m gpt-5.6-sol
forbidden: edits under pkg/** source (gaps found become flags/candidate follow-ups)
edits under examples/invoice-triage/** (it is the reference, not the workpiece)
publishing/pushing outside branch okra/pumped-fn-skill without human approval
action_envelope.human_ratification_boundary: Reject any attempted frame, guardrail, metric, threshold, or action-envelope change unless the human ratifies it.

anti_goals.activation: any pumped-fn code written (skill examples, eval solutions, harness fixtures)
anti_goals.metric: lint_diagnostics == 0 on every produced pumped-fn artifact at every check-in, not only at the end (pumped lint: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs)
anti_goals.name: zero-lint-always

anti_goals.activation: eval-suite design, eval scoring, skill-content authoring
anti_goals.metric: overfit_eval_count == 0 — no eval task solvable by replaying the invoice-triage story or its domain; independent challenger issues a similarity verdict per eval task before the suite is ratified; skill content may cite invoice-triage as one worked example but the eval answer key must never be derivable from it
anti_goals.name: no-overfit-to-invoice-triage

anti_goals.activation: every accepted claim, checkpoint, and eval grade
anti_goals.metric: single_llm_truth_acceptance_count == 0 — writer packets run on codex gpt-5.6-terra, review/grading packets on codex gpt-5.6-sol, orchestration on claude-fable-5; no accepted claim graded by its own author model; every accepted claim carries independent deterministic or cross-model evidence
anti_goals.name: no-single-llm-truth

anti_goals.activation: any file write outside .okra/ and skills/pumped-fn/
anti_goals.metric: repo_suite_regression == 0 — workspace lint/typecheck/tests that were green before the run stay green (dist rebuilt before gates per rebuild-dist-before-workspace-gates)
anti_goals.name: no-repo-regression

AG-1.read: deterministic: node pkg/tool/lint/dist/cli.mjs <paths>; exit code + diagnostic count
AG-1.source: pumped lint CLI over every produced artifact path

AG-2.read: count of tasks with verdict overfit
AG-2.source: challenger similarity verdicts (cross-model) stored per eval task

AG-3.source: dispatch records in ledger name the model per packet; acceptance records cite evidence class

AG-4.max_age: before any commit touching shared surface
AG-4.source: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r lint/typecheck/test on touched packages vs pre-run baseline

cold_build_eval_score.denominator: eval suite ratified by human before first official read
cold_build_eval_score.read: orchestrator dispatches eval runs + verification worker; transcripts and diffs stored by hash
cold_build_eval_score.source: fresh cold sessions given ONLY skills/pumped-fn/ content + one eval task, in an isolated workspace with pumped-fn deps installed; deterministic gate script computes hard-gate portion; codex gpt-5.6-sol grades the idiom rubric portion from the diff

objective.statement: Ship a repo-distributable skill (skills/pumped-fn/) that trains an LLM to design and write pumped-fn code at invoice-triage quality: choose the right primitive, write the code, the tests, and the extensions — fully testable, readable, performant
objective.target: weighted rubric score >= 85% across the ratified eval suite (~10 novel-domain build tasks); per-task score = hard gates (lint 0, typecheck clean, tests green, entrypoint runs) + idiom rubric graded cross-model; eval suite and rubric weights ratified by human before the first official read (denominator freeze); interim reads before ratification are candidate-only
objective.type: capability-transfer (skill-engineering run); the metric proves a cold session + skill produces idiomatic pumped-fn output on tasks it has never seen

ratification.notes: Ratified via AskUserQuestion in-session: objective = weighted rubric >= 85%; placement = skills/pumped-fn/ repo-distributable; mode = fully-autopilot delegated loop on branch okra/pumped-fn-skill with committed .okra store. Anti-goals AG-1..AG-3 stated verbatim by user in the goal message; AG-4/AG-5 standard walls carried from candidate library .okra/memory/pumped-fn-lite/candidate-anti-goals.v1.json.
